title: Claude Fable 5 is Banned... Do THIS Right Now
summary: Jack Roberts demonstrates how to run open-source AI models locally using Ollama and build a free NotebookLM alternative with open notebook, in response to Claude Fable 5 being withdrawn. The video covers model routing via OpenRouter and strategies to maintain access to multiple models without cloud dependencies.
writeup: Prompted by the withdrawal of Claude Fable 5, the video walks through running open-source AI models locally with Ollama and assembling a free NotebookLM alternative using open notebook. It also covers model routing through OpenRouter as a way to keep access to multiple models without depending on the cloud. The core takeaway is a setup that preserves multi-model access through local inference and routing rather than a single hosted service.
